steps.title: Set equations equal
steps.content:
At the intersection, both equations have the same $y$-value:
$$
2x+5=5x-4
$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Move the $x$-terms and constants to opposite sides:
$$
9=3x
$$
$$
x=3
$$

steps.title: Find y
steps.content: Substitute $x=3$ into $y=2x+5$: $$ y=2(3)+5=11 $$ The intersection is $(3,11)$. The answer is C.
